prompt: In Mail, pick any conversation/thread (or one whose subject contains 'KinBench 161') and export the entire thread as ONE PDF file to ~/Desktop/kinbench/161-thread.pdf. Use File > Export as PDF on the thread, or Print > Save as PDF. If no real thread is available on this rig, generate a placeholder valid PDF at that path. The eval just checks the file exists and looks like a PDF.
